title: avornela canariensis
intro: Avornela canariensis, also known as Canary Island lavender, is a plant species native to the Canary Islands, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Avornela canariensis include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. Herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used to make calming remedies, such as perfumes, candles, and skincare products.
